response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with strong recent alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) at Optilyz and re:cinq. His current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. He demonstrates software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), teaching/workshop experience, and architectural breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited Kotlin exposure (Java only), and the Kenya location tags across roles appear inconsistent with a Berlin base — worth clarifying.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP experience at current role aligns with key requirement
Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB stack match plus AWS CDK and Docker
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Kotlin not mentioned (only Java); secondary stack coverage is partial
Repeated 'Kenya' location across all roles conflicts with Berlin base — possible resume data issue
